html.notes: Semantic HTML5 structure with proper landmarks (header, main, footer, nav, section, article). Headings in logical order h1→h2→h3. All interactive elements are proper <button> or <a> tags. ARIA labels on icon-only buttons, carousel controls, and theme toggle. Skip-to-content link present. Form has <label> with htmlFor. No lorem ipsum — all real copy.

css.notes: CSS validates cleanly. Uses custom properties for theme switching. All CSS selectors correspond to HTML classes. Dynamic classes (.visible, .open, .pop, .show, .invalid) are added by JavaScript at runtime — expected behavior.

css_selectors.notes: All dead selectors are dynamic classes added by JavaScript (theme-addable states). '.css' is a false positive from the parser. No missing styles for static HTML classes.

theme_system.details: Dark theme is default (data-theme='dark' on <html>). Toggle button with moon emoji 🌙 for dark, sun ☀️ for light. localStorage stores preference and restores on reload. CSS transition: background-color 0.3s, color 0.3s on body and all themed elements via --transition-theme custom property.

scroll_animations.details: Sections start with .section-hidden (opacity:0, translateY(40px)). IntersectionObserver at 15% threshold adds .visible class transitioning to opacity:1, translateY(0) over 0.6s ease-out. Hero section gets .visible immediately on DOMContentLoaded. Each section unobserves after animation trigger for performance.

navbar.details: Sticky header with backdrop-filter blur. Logo 'Dashflow' left. 4 nav links: Features (#features), Stats (#stats), Pricing (#pricing), Contact (#contact). Theme toggle button right. Hamburger menu on mobile (<768px) slides from right with cubic-bezier transition. Hamburger animates to X on open. Menu closes on link click. Smooth scroll on all anchor links.

hero.details: Headline 'Powerful Analytics for Modern Teams' with gradient text (background-clip). Subheadline. CTA button 'Get Started Free' with CSS pulse animation (scale 1→1.03→1 every 2s). Animated gradient background via @keyframes heroGradientShift. Floating radial gradient orbs via ::before/::after pseudo-elements. Min-height 85vh.

features.details: 3 cards with emoji icons (📊 Real-Time Analytics, 🛡️ Enterprise Security, ⚡ Lightning Fast). CSS Grid: 1col mobile, 2col @768px, 3col @1024px. Cards have hover lift effect: translateY(-4px) + box-shadow increase + 0.2s transition.

stats.details: 4 counters: 12,500+ Projects, 8,200+ Users, 99.9% Uptime, 24 Awards. Each counter animates from 0 to target using requestAnimationFrame with ease-out cubic easing over 2 seconds. IntersectionObserver triggers animation once when stats section enters viewport at 30% threshold. .pop class added at completion for scale(1.15) pop effect, removed after 300ms.

testimonials.details: 3 testimonial slides with blockquote, name, role. Prev/Next arrow buttons and 3 dot indicators. Clicking dot or button shows corresponding slide with fade+translateX transition. Auto-advance every 5 seconds via setInterval. Pauses on mouseenter (carousel hover), resumes on mouseleave. Wraps around at ends. aria-live='polite' on carousel for accessibility.

pricing.details: 3 tiers: Starter $9/mo, Pro $29/mo (recommended), Enterprise $99/mo. Pro card has --featured modifier with primary border and 'Most Popular' badge positioned absolute at top center. Cards are equal height via flex column layout. Hover: scale(1.02) + box-shadow increase. Responsive: 1col mobile, 2col @640px, 3col @1024px.

newsletter.details: Email input + Subscribe button. Form submit validates with regex /^[^\s@]+@[^\s@]+\.[^\s@]+$/. Invalid: adds .invalid class → red border + CSS shake @keyframes animation (0.4s), removed after 600ms. Valid: clears input, shows green toast 'Subscribed!' with .show class, auto-fades after 3s. Toast positioned fixed bottom-right with opacity+translateY transition.

footer.details: 4-column grid: Product (Features, Pricing, Security), Company (About, Blog, Careers), Support (Help Center, Contact, Privacy), Connect (🐦 Twitter, 💼 LinkedIn, 🐙 GitHub). Copyright line. Border-top separators.

responsive_design.mobile_375px: Single column. Hamburger menu (slide from right, animated). Stacked cards. nav__links position:fixed, transform:translateX(100%) → .open → translateX(0).
responsive_design.tablet_768px: 2-column features grid. 4-column stats grid. 3-column footer grid. 2-column pricing. Hamburger hidden, nav links visible as flex row. Nav links position:static.
responsive_design.desktop_1024px: 3-column features grid. 3-column pricing grid. 4-column footer grid. 85vh hero. Full horizontal navbar.

accessibility.headings: PASS — h1→h2→h3 in logical order, no skipped levels
accessibility.aria_labels: PASS — aria-label on icon-only buttons (theme toggle, hamburger, carousel controls, social links)
accessibility.aria_live: PASS — carousel has aria-live='polite', toast has role='alert'
accessibility.focus_visible: PASS — :focus-visible with 2px outline + 3px offset on all interactive elements
accessibility.skip_to_content: PASS — skip link present, becomes visible on focus
accessibility.reduced_motion: PASS — prefers-reduced-motion media query disables all animations/transitions
accessibility.keyboard_navigation: PASS — all interactive elements reachable via Tab, carousel buttons keyboard accessible

javascript.notes: All vanilla ES6+ JavaScript. All DOM queries reference real elements with null checks. Event delegation not used (direct listeners on known elements). All features have proper guard clauses.

performance_notes: No external CDNs or frameworks — pure HTML/CSS/JS
IntersectionObserver unobserves sections after animation trigger
requestAnimationFrame used for smooth counter animations
CSS animations use transform and opacity (GPU-composited properties)
Backdrop-filter on navbar with -webkit- prefix for Safari
known_limitations: Dynamic CSS classes (.visible, .open, .pop, .show, .invalid) flagged as dead selectors by static analysis — they are added at runtime by JavaScript
The hero-bg.png generated image is not directly used — the hero uses CSS animated gradients as specified in the requirements
No polyfills for IntersectionObserver — supported in all modern browsers (Chrome 51+, Firefox 55+, Safari 12.1+, Edge 15+)
overall_status: PASS — All deliverables complete and validated
